hooks.command: last=$(tail -1 .claude/session_log.txt 2>/dev/null | grep -oE '[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2} [0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2}'); now=$(date +%s); last_ts=$([ -n "$last" ] && date -j -f '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S' "$last" +%s 2>/dev/null || echo 0); diff=$((now - last_ts)); [ $diff -gt 1800 ] && echo "세션시작 : $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')" >> .claude/session_log.txt
